context: Tests whether the agent pins task versions, uses a specific vmImage version (not ubuntu-latest), adds displayName to every step, uses correct Sentence case for displayName, and configures Cache@2 for npm.

checklist.name: Pinned vmImage
checklist.description: The pool vmImage is set to a specific version (e.g., ubuntu-22.04) and NOT ubuntu-latest or windows-latest

checklist.name: Task version pinned
checklist.description: All tasks use the @version syntax (e.g., NodeTool@0, PublishTestResults@2) and NOT @latest or bare task names without version

checklist.name: displayName on all tasks
checklist.description: Every task and script step has a displayName property (no step without displayName)

checklist.name: Sentence case displayName
checklist.description: All displayName values use Sentence case (first word capitalized, rest lowercase, e.g., 'Install dependencies', not 'INSTALL DEPENDENCIES' or 'Install Dependencies')

checklist.name: Cache@2 for npm
checklist.description: A Cache@2 task is included to cache npm packages

checklist.name: PublishTestResults task
checklist.description: A PublishTestResults@2 task is included with condition: succeededOrFailed()

checklist.name: Explicit trigger branches
checklist.description: The trigger section specifies explicit branch includes (main and develop) and does NOT use `trigger: none`

checklist.name: NodeTool version specified
checklist.description: NodeTool@0 (or equivalent) is used with an explicit versionSpec (e.g., '20.x', '18.x')

checklist.name: npm ci used
checklist.description: The pipeline uses `npm ci` (not `npm install`) for dependency installation

checklist.name: No @latest usage
checklist.description: No task uses @latest version (zero occurrences of @latest in the file)

checklist.name: camelCase variables
checklist.description: Pipeline variable names use camelCase or snake_case (not mixed case like 'BuildConfiguration' or 'BUILD_CONFIGURATION')
